message:
fix(tests): improve E2E harness normalization and add unit tests (beads_rust-nh50)

- Fix NormalizedJson compare mode to properly ignore timestamps when masked
  Timestamp tolerance issues are now logged but don't fail the match
- Add comprehensive unit tests for scenario DSL and normalization logic
- Fix format strings in artifact_validator.rs for Rust compatibility
- Update workspace mutability for copy operations

Closes: beads_rust-nh50

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
